title: Clash
description:
Can only be played if every card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] is an Attack.
Deal 14 damage.
upgraded_description:
Can only be played if every card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] is an Attack.
Deal 18 damage.
notes: Can only be played if every card in your hand is an Attack. This condition is checked by the IsPlayable property and enables the gold glow when playable.
